eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Custer, OK; at 01:46 PM ON MAR 25, 2026 Effective until 04:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 3:37  a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control 3.5 Miles South of Butler spreading rapidly North. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for Cornerstone Church  1900 Lexington Ave  Clinton  Oklahoma  73601. Those between E 980 Rd and E 940 Rd and N 2150 Rd and N2130 Rd should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. Reunification Center is setting up at Cornerstone Church  1900 Lexington Ave  Clinton  Oklahoma  73601.
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
